problem_solved: Clinical documentation burden and administrative tasks reduce provider productivity and patient satisfaction
solution_description: Dragon Ambient eXperience (DAX) - ambient clinical intelligence that automatically documents patient encounters. Part of Microsoft Cloud for Healthcare. Integrates Dragon Medical One for speech recognition and PowerMic Mobile for wireless dictation. Enterprise-grade AI for clinical workflow transformation
traction_signals: Dragon Medical One - advanced speech recognition
PowerMic Mobile for wireless EHR navigation
Part of Microsoft Cloud for Healthcare
notes: Microsoft ownership provides enterprise credibility and Azure integration. Dragon speech recognition technology is market-leading. May be less suitable for smaller Nordic deployments due to enterprise focus
